name: AMAZE HOLDINGS, INC.
summary: PART I . Overview Amaze Holdings, Inc. (formerly Fresh Vine Wine, Inc.) is a technology-enabled, creator-powered commerce platform that enables creators, brands, and consumers to transact at scale. Following the acquisition of Amaze Software, Inc. in March 2025, the Company transitioned its primary business from a consumer-packaged goods company into a software-driven commerce, data, and distribution platform for the creator economy.
